Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Standard categories *)
(** ** Contents:

- The path groupoid ([path_groupoid])
- Discrete categories
  - Characterization of discrete categories
- The discrete univalent_category on n objects ([cat_n])
  - The category with one object ([unit_category])
  - The category with no objects ([empty_category])
  - The directed interval
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Setcategories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Groupoids.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Initial.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.catiso.

Local Open Scope cat.


C: precategory_data
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
C ⟦ a, c ⟧


C: precategory_data
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
C ⟦ a, c ⟧
 
C: precategory_data
a, b, c: C
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
C ⟦ a, c ⟧
 exact (compose f g). Defined.

(** ** The path/fundamental groupoid of a type *)

(** The pregroupoid with points in X as objects and paths as morphisms *)

X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
pregroupoid

  
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
category
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
is_pregroupoid ?C

iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
category
 
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
precategory
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
(λ C : precategory, has_homsets C) ?pr1

    
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
precategory

iobj: isofhlevel 3 X

X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
(λ C : precategory_ob_mor, precategory_id_comp C) ?pr1
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
(∏ (a b : ?pr1,, ?pr20) (f : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
 identity a · f = f)
× (∏ (a b : ?pr1,, ?pr20)
   (f : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ a, b ⟧), 
   f · identity b = f)
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
(λ _ : (∏ (a b : ?pr1,, ?pr20)
        (f : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
        identity a · f = f)
       × (∏ (a b : ?pr1,, ?pr20)
          (f : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
          f · identity b = f),
 ∏ (a b c d : ?pr1,, ?pr20)
 (f : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
 (g : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
 (h : (?pr1,, ?pr20) ⟦ c, d ⟧),
 f · (g · h) = f · g · h) 
  ?pr10

iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
precategory_ob_mor
 exact (X,, λ x y, x = y).
    
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X

  (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y))
 
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
∏ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
(X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ c, c ⟧
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
∏ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
(X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ a, c ⟧

      
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
∏ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
(X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact (λ _, idpath _).
      
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
∏ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
(X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)) ⟦ a, c ⟧

                      idpath c)

                         c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                      pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             pathscomp0rid f)))))

    
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
a, b: make_precategory_one_assoc
  ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod
     (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
     (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), pathscomp0))
  (make_dirprod
     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
      (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
      (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod
              (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧), 
      idpath f)
     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
      (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
      (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod
              (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      pathscomp0rid f),,
   (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
    (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
           (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            pathscomp0))
    (c : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
           (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            pathscomp0))
    (d : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            idpath c0)
           (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            pathscomp0))
    (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
          make_dirprod
            (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             idpath c0)
            (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
          make_dirprod
            (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             idpath c0)
            (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             pathscomp0)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
    path_assoc f g))
x, x': make_precategory_one_assoc
  ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod
     (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
     (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
      pathscomp0))
  (make_dirprod
     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
      (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
      (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod
              (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧), 
      idpath f)
     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
      (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
      (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod
              (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      pathscomp0rid f),,
   (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
    (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            idpath c)
           (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            pathscomp0))
    (c : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            idpath c)
           (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            pathscomp0))
    (d : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
         make_dirprod
           (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            idpath c0)
           (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
            pathscomp0))
    (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
          make_dirprod
            (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             idpath c0)
            (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
    (g : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
          make_dirprod
            (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             idpath c0)
            (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
             pathscomp0)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
    path_assoc f g)) ⟦ a, b ⟧
x0, x'0: x = x'
isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x'0)

    apply iobj.
  
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
is_pregroupoid
  (make_precategory_one_assoc
     ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
      make_dirprod
        (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
        (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), pathscomp0))
     (make_dirprod
        (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod
                  (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                   idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                   pathscomp0))
         (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c)
                (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0))
         (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod
                 (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  idpath c)
                 (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧), idpath f)
        (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                make_dirprod
                  (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                   idpath c)
                  (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                   pathscomp0))
         (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c)
                (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0))
         (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod
                 (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  idpath c)
                 (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         pathscomp0rid f),,
      ((λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod
                 (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  pathscomp0))
        (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
               (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (c : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
               (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (d : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c0)
               (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c0)
                (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
        (g : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c0)
                (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
        path_assoc f g)
       :
       (λ _ : (∏
               (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                    make_dirprod
                      (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       idpath c)
                      (λ a b
                          c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       pathscomp0))
               (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                    make_dirprod
                      (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       idpath c)
                      (λ a0 b
                          c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       pathscomp0))
               (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                     make_dirprod
                       (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                        idpath c)
                       (λ a0 b0
                           c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                        pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
               identity a · f = f)
              × (∏
                 (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                      make_dirprod
                        (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                         idpath c)
                        (λ a b
                            c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                         pathscomp0))
                 (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                      make_dirprod
                        (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                         idpath c)
                        (λ a0 b
                            c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                         pathscomp0))
                 (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                       make_dirprod
                         (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                          idpath c)
                         (λ a0 b0
                             c : X,,
                                 (λ x y : X, x = y),
                          pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                 f · identity b = f),
        ∏
        (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
               (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (c : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
               (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (d : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c0)
               (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
        (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c0)
                (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
        (g : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c0)
                (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0)) ⟦ b, c ⟧)
        (h : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
              make_dirprod
                (λ c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 idpath c0)
                (λ a0 b0 c0 : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                 pathscomp0)) ⟦ c, d ⟧),
        f · (g · h) = f · g · h)
         (make_dirprod
            (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                    make_dirprod
                      (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       idpath c)
                      (λ a b
                          c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       pathscomp0))
             (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod
                    (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                     idpath c)
                    (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                     pathscomp0))
             (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                   make_dirprod
                     (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                      idpath c)
                     (λ a0 b0
                         c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                      pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧), idpath f)
            (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                    make_dirprod
                      (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       idpath c)
                      (λ a b
                          c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                       pathscomp0))
             (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                  make_dirprod
                    (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                     idpath c)
                    (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                     pathscomp0))
             (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
                   make_dirprod
                     (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                      idpath c)
                     (λ a0 b0
                         c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                      pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
             pathscomp0rid f)))),,
   ((λ (a : make_precategory_one_assoc
              ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
               make_dirprod
                 (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  idpath c)
                 (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                  pathscomp0))

                          (λ a0 b0
                              c : X,,
                                  (λ x y : X, x = y),

                        pathscomp0))
                (c : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,

                        pathscomp0))

                        idpath c0)

                        pathscomp0))

                            c0 : X,,

                         idpath c0)
                        (λ a0 b0
                            c0 : X,,
                                 (λ x y : X, x = y),
                         pathscomp0)) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                path_assoc f g)))
     (b : make_precategory_one_assoc
            ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)

            (make_dirprod

⟦ x, y ⟧
is_inverse_in_precat path (! path)

⟦ x, y ⟧
path · (! path) = identity x
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
x, y: make_precategory_one_assoc
  ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod
     (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
     (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), pathscomp0))

     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
      (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
      (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod
              (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧), 
      idpath f)
     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,

               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      pathscomp0rid f),,
   (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,

⟦ x, y ⟧
(! path) · path = identity y

    
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
x, y: make_precategory_one_assoc
  ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
   make_dirprod
     (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), idpath c)
     (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y), pathscomp0))

             make_dirprod
               (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                idpath c)
               (λ a b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
                pathscomp0))
      (b : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              idpath c)
             (λ a0 b c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
              pathscomp0))
      (f : ((X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
            make_dirprod
              (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               idpath c)
              (λ a0 b0 c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),
               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧), 
      idpath f)
     (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
             make_dirprod

                idpath c)

                pathscomp0))

               idpath c)

               pathscomp0)) ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      pathscomp0rid f),,
   (λ (a : (X,, (λ x y : X, x = y)),,
           make_dirprod
             (λ c : X,, (λ x y : X, x = y),

  (x0 x'0 : x = x'), iobj a b x x' x0 x'0))
⟦ x, y ⟧
path · (! path) = identity x
 apply pathsinv0r.

iobj: isofhlevel 3 X

           (b0 : (X,, (λ x0 y : X, x0 = y)),,
                 make_dirprod
                   (λ c : X,, (λ x0 y : X, x0 = y),
                    idpath c)
                   (λ a1 b0
                       c : 
                       X,, 
                       (λ x0 y : X, x0 = y),
                    pathscomp0))
           (c : (X,, (λ x0 y : X, x0 = y)),,
                make_dirprod
                  (λ c : X,, (λ x0 y : X, x0 = y),
                   idpath c)
                  (λ a1 b1

                    pathscomp0)) ⟦ b0, c ⟧),
           path_assoc f g)) ⟦ a, b ⟧)

⟦ x, y ⟧
(! path) · path = identity y
 apply pathsinv0l.
Defined.

(** If X [isofhlevel] 3, then in particular, its path types are sets *)

X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
has_homsets (path_pregroupoid X iobj)


X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
has_homsets (path_pregroupoid X iobj)

  apply homset_property.
Defined.


X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
groupoid


X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
groupoid

  
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
category
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
is_pregroupoid ?C

  
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
category
 
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
precategory
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
(λ C : precategory, has_homsets C) ?C

    
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
precategory
 exact (path_pregroupoid X iobj).
    
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
(λ C : precategory, has_homsets C)
  (path_pregroupoid X iobj)
 apply (has_homsets_path_pregroupoid); assumption.
  
X: UU
iobj: isofhlevel 3 X
is_pregroupoid
  (make_category (path_pregroupoid X iobj)
     (has_homsets_path_pregroupoid iobj))
 apply (pregroupoid_is_pregroupoid (path_pregroupoid X iobj)).
Defined.

(** In this case, the path pregroupoid is further univalent. *)

X: UU

is_univalent_pregroupoid (path_pregroupoid X iobj)

is_univalent_pregroupoid (path_pregroupoid X iobj)

 intro p; destruct p; reflexivity.

Defined.

  (make_univalent_category (path_groupoid X i3)
     (is_univalent_path_groupoid X i3))

Defined.

Definition path_groupoid_hset (X : hSet) : univalent_groupoid :=
  (path_univalent_groupoid (isofhlevelssnset 1 _ (setproperty X))).

(** When X is a set, its path pregroupoid is the discrete category on its elements. *)

X: hSet
is_discrete (path_groupoid_hset X)


X: hSet
is_discrete (path_groupoid_hset X)

  
X: hSet
object_hlevel 2 (path_groupoid_hset X)
X: hSet
homtype_hlevel 2 (path_groupoid_hset X)
X: hSet
is_pregroupoid (path_groupoid_hset X)
X: hSet
is_univalent (path_groupoid_hset X)

  
X: hSet
object_hlevel 2 (path_groupoid_hset X)
 apply setproperty.
  
X: hSet
homtype_hlevel 2 (path_groupoid_hset X)
 apply homset_property.
  
X: hSet
is_pregroupoid (path_groupoid_hset X)
 apply pregroupoid_is_pregroupoid.
  
X: hSet
is_univalent (path_groupoid_hset X)
 apply univalent_category_is_univalent.
Defined.

Definition discrete_category_hset (X : hSet) : discrete_category :=
  make_discrete_category (path_groupoid_hset X) (path_groupoid_hset_is_discrete X).

(** To define a functor out of a path pregroupoid, it suffices to give
    its values on objects. Compare to [functor_discrete_categories]. *)

X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D

path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D

functor_data (path_pregroupoid X i) D

f: X → D
is_functor ?F

D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
functor_data (path_pregroupoid X i) D
 
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
path_pregroupoid X i → D
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
∏ a b : path_pregroupoid X i,
path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
path_pregroupoid X i → D
 apply f.
    
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
∏ a b : path_pregroupoid X i,
path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧ → D ⟦ f a, f b ⟧
 
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
a, b: path_pregroupoid X i
aeqb: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧
D ⟦ f a, f b ⟧

      exact (transportf (λ z, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧) (maponpaths f aeqb) (identity _)).
  
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
is_functor
  (make_functor_data f
     (λ (a b : path_pregroupoid X i)
      (aeqb : path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧)
        (maponpaths f aeqb) (identity (f a))))

D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data f
     (λ (a b : path_pregroupoid X i)
      (aeqb : path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧)
        (maponpaths f aeqb) (identity (f a))))
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data f
     (λ (a b : path_pregroupoid X i)
      (aeqb : path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧)
        (maponpaths f aeqb) (identity (f a))))

    
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data f
     (λ (a b : path_pregroupoid X i)
      (aeqb : path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧)
        (maponpaths f aeqb) (identity (f a))))
 intro; reflexivity.
    
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data f
     (λ (a b : path_pregroupoid X i)
      (aeqb : path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧)
        (maponpaths f aeqb) (identity (f a))))
 
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
a, b, c: path_pregroupoid X i
g: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ b, c ⟧
transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧)
  (maponpaths f (g @ h)) (identity (f a)) =
transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧) (maponpaths f g)
  (identity (f a))
· transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f b, z ⟧) (maponpaths f h)
    (identity (f b))

      
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
a, b, c: path_pregroupoid X i
g: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ b, c ⟧
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f a))
  (maponpaths f g @ maponpaths f h) (identity (f a)) =
transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧) (maponpaths f g)
  (identity (f a))
· transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f b, z ⟧) (maponpaths f h)
    (identity (f b))

      
X: UU
D: category
i: isofhlevel 3 X
f: X → D
a, b, c: path_pregroupoid X i
g: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: path_pregroupoid X i ⟦ b, c ⟧
transportf (precategory_morphisms (f a))
  (maponpaths f h)
  (transportf (precategory_morphisms (f a))
     (maponpaths f g) (identity (f a))) =
transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f a, z ⟧) (maponpaths f g)
  (identity (f a))
· transportf (λ z : D, D ⟦ f b, z ⟧) (maponpaths f h)
    (identity (f b))

      abstract (induction h; cbn; apply pathsinv0; apply id_right).
Defined.

(** A natural transformation of functors out of a path groupoid is given by any
    family of morphisms *)

X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
is_nat_trans (pr1 f) (pr1 g) F


X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
is_nat_trans (pr1 f) (pr1 g) F

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x, y: path_pregroupoid X i
h: x = y
# (pr1 f) h · F y = F x · # (pr1 g) h

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
# (pr1 f) (idpath x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (idpath x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
# (pr1 f) (identity x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (identity x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
k: identity (f x) = # f (identity x)
# (pr1 f) (identity x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (identity x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
k: identity (pr1 f x) = # (pr1 f) (identity x)
# (pr1 f) (identity x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (identity x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
identity (pr1 f x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (identity x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
k: identity (g x) = # g (identity x)
identity (pr1 f x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (identity x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
k: identity (pr1 g x) = # (pr1 g) (identity x)
identity (pr1 f x) · F x =
F x · # (pr1 g) (identity x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
identity (pr1 f x) · F x = F x · identity (pr1 g x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
identity (pr1 f x) · F x = F x
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
F x = F x · identity (pr1 g x)

  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
identity (pr1 f x) · F x = F x
 apply id_left.
  
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
F x = F x · identity (pr1 g x)
 
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
f, g: [path_pregroupoid X i, D]
F: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ pr1 f x, pr1 g x ⟧
x: path_pregroupoid X i
F x · identity (pr1 g x) = F x
 apply id_right.
Qed.


X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
F, G: path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D
ϕ: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
F ⟹ G


X: UU

D: category
F, G: path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D
ϕ: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
F ⟹ G

D: category

ϕ: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
nat_trans_data F G
X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
F, G: path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D
ϕ: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
is_nat_trans F G ?t


X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
F, G: path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D
ϕ: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
nat_trans_data F G
 intros z; apply (ϕ z).

X: UU
i: isofhlevel 3 X
D: category
F, G: path_pregroupoid X i ⟶ D
ϕ: ∏ x : X, D ⟦ F x, G x ⟧
is_nat_trans F G
  ((λ z : path_pregroupoid X i, ϕ z)
   :
   nat_trans_data F G)
 apply (is_nat_trans_discrete_precategory).
Defined.


(** *** Characterization of discrete categories *)

(** Discrete categories are isomorphic to the path groupoid on their set of objects.
    This is analogous to the statement that any skeletal groupoid is discrete. *)


C: discrete_category
catiso C
  (discrete_category_hset
     (setcategory_objects_set
        (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)))


C: discrete_category
catiso C
  (discrete_category_hset
     (setcategory_objects_set
        (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)))

  
C: discrete_category
C
⟶ discrete_category_hset
    (setcategory_objects_set
       (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
C: discrete_category
(λ F : C
       ⟶ discrete_category_hset
           (setcategory_objects_set
              (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)),
 is_catiso F) ?pr1

  
C: discrete_category
C
⟶ discrete_category_hset
    (setcategory_objects_set
       (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
 
C: discrete_category
functor_data C
  (discrete_category_hset
     (setcategory_objects_set
        (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)))
C: discrete_category
is_functor ?F

    
C: discrete_category
functor_data C
  (discrete_category_hset
     (setcategory_objects_set
        (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)))
 
C: discrete_category
C
→ discrete_category_hset
    (setcategory_objects_set
       (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
C: discrete_category
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ discrete_category_hset
    (setcategory_objects_set
       (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
  ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

      
C: discrete_category
C
→ discrete_category_hset
    (setcategory_objects_set
       (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
 exact (idfun _).
      
C: discrete_category
∏ a b : C,
C ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ discrete_category_hset
    (setcategory_objects_set
       (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
  ⟦ idfun C a, idfun C b ⟧
 
C: discrete_category
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
discrete_category_hset
  (setcategory_objects_set
     (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
⟦ idfun C a, idfun C b ⟧

        
C: discrete_category
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_univalent (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
C: discrete_category
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
z_iso (idfun C a) (idfun C b)

        
C: discrete_category
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
is_univalent (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
 apply univalent_category_is_univalent.
        
C: discrete_category
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
z_iso (idfun C a) (idfun C b)
 exact (@pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso C _ _ f).
    
C: discrete_category
is_functor
  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      isotoid (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
        (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
 
C: discrete_category
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      isotoid (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
        (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
C: discrete_category
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      isotoid (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
        (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))

      
C: discrete_category
functor_idax
  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      isotoid (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
        (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
 intro; apply setproperty.
      
C: discrete_category
functor_compax
  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      isotoid (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
        (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
 intros ? ? ? ? ?; apply setproperty.
  
C: discrete_category
(λ F : C
       ⟶ discrete_category_hset
           (setcategory_objects_set
              (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)),
 is_catiso F)
  (make_functor
     (make_functor_data (idfun C)
        (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         isotoid
           (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
           (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
           (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
     (make_dirprod
        ((λ a : C,
          let X :=
            λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
            (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
            pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
          X
            (setcategory_objects_set
               (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)) a)
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)) a)
            (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)))
               (identity a))
            (identity
               (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f))
                  a)))
         :
         functor_idax
           (make_functor_data (idfun C)
              (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
               isotoid
                 (C,,
                  discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                 (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                 (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f))))
        ((λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
          let X :=
            λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
            (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
            pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
          X
            (setcategory_objects_set
               (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0))
               a)
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0))
               c)

                  (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),

                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0)))
               (f · g))
            (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0)))
               f

                    (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                     (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                     isotoid
                       (C,,
                        discrete_category_is_setcategory
                          C)
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent
                          C)
                       (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0
                          f0))) g))

              (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
               isotoid
                 (C,,
                  discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                 (univalent_category_is_univalent C)

fully_faithful

                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)

                     (C,,

                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0))

                      discrete_category_is_setcategory

                         C)

                (identity a))

⟦ make_functor
    (make_functor_data (idfun C)

        isotoid

                 isotoid
                   (C,,

                   (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                   (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)) a)))

        (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
        let X :=
          λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
          (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
          pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
        X
          (setcategory_objects_set

                (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0)) c)

             (f · g))

  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
     (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
      isotoid (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
        (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
  (make_dirprod
     (λ a : C,
      let X :=
        λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
        pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
      X
        (setcategory_objects_set
           (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
        (make_functor_data (idfun C)

            isotoid

                   (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0)))
             g))) b ⟧ → C ⟦ a, b ⟧

a, b: C
∏ x : C ⟦ a, b ⟧,
?g

        (make_functor_data (idfun C)

              pr1 (setproperty X x0 x' x1 x'0) in

                          C)
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent
                          C)
                       (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)))
                 (identity a))

                    (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                     isotoid
                       (C,,
                        discrete_category_is_setcategory
                          C)
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent

                       (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f))
                    a)))
           (λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
            (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
            let X :=

                 (C,,

                          C)
                       (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0
                          f0))) (f · g))

                     isotoid

                       isotoid

                            C)
                         (univalent_category_is_univalent

                         (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0

  (# (make_functor

 intro; apply discrete_category_hom_prop.
      
C: discrete_category
a, b: C
∏
y : discrete_category_hset
      (setcategory_objects_set
         (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
    ⟦ make_functor
        (make_functor_data (idfun C)

            isotoid

                                C)
                             (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso
                                a0 b f)) a)))
                 (λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                  (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                  let X :=
                    λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
                    (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                    pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
                  X
                    (setcategory_objects_set
                       (C,,
                        discrete_category_is_setcategory
                          C))
                    (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                       (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                        (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                        isotoid
                          (C,,
                           discrete_category_is_setcategory
                             C)
                          (univalent_category_is_univalent
                             C)
                          (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0
                             b0 f0)) a)
                    (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                       (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                        (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                        isotoid
                          (C,,
                           discrete_category_is_setcategory
                             C)
                          (univalent_category_is_univalent
                             C)
                          (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0
                             b0 f0)) c)
                    (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                          (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                           (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                           isotoid
                             (C,,
                              discrete_category_is_setcategory
                                C)
                             (univalent_category_is_univalent
                                C)
                             (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso
                                a0 b0 f0))) (f · g))
                    (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                          (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                           (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                           isotoid
                             (C,,
                              discrete_category_is_setcategory
                                C)
                             (univalent_category_is_univalent
                                C)
                             (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso
                                a0 b0 f0))) f
                     · # (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                            (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                             (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                             isotoid
                               (C,,
                                discrete_category_is_setcategory
                                  C)
                               (univalent_category_is_univalent
                                  C)
                               (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso
                                  a0 b0 f0))) g))) a,
          make_functor
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
            (make_dirprod
               (λ a : C,
                let X :=
                  λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
                  (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                  pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
                X
                  (setcategory_objects_set
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C))
                  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                     (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                      isotoid
                        (C,,
                         discrete_category_is_setcategory
                           C)
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C)
                        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b
                           f)) a)
                  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                     (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                      isotoid
                        (C,,
                         discrete_category_is_setcategory
                           C)
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C)
                        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b
                           f)) a)
                  (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                        (λ (a0 b : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                         isotoid
                           (C,,
                            discrete_category_is_setcategory
                              C)
                           (univalent_category_is_univalent
                              C)
                           (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0
                              b f))) (identity a))
                  (identity
                     (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                        (λ (a0 b : C)
                         (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                         isotoid
                           (C,,
                            discrete_category_is_setcategory
                              C)
                           (univalent_category_is_univalent
                              C)
                           (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0
                              b f)) a)))
               (λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
                let X :=
                  λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
                  (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
                  pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
                X
                  (setcategory_objects_set
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C))
                  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                     (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                      isotoid
                        (C,,
                         discrete_category_is_setcategory
                           C)
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C)
                        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0
                           f0)) a)
                  (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                     (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                      (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                      isotoid
                        (C,,
                         discrete_category_is_setcategory
                           C)
                        (univalent_category_is_univalent
                           C)
                        (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0
                           f0)) c)
                  (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                        (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                         (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                         isotoid
                           (C,,
                            discrete_category_is_setcategory
                              C)
                           (univalent_category_is_univalent
                              C)
                           (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0
                              b0 f0))) (f · g))
                  (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                        (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                         (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                         isotoid
                           (C,,
                            discrete_category_is_setcategory
                              C)
                           (univalent_category_is_univalent
                              C)
                           (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0
                              b0 f0))) f
                   · # (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                          (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                           (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                           isotoid
                             (C,,
                              discrete_category_is_setcategory
                                C)
                             (univalent_category_is_univalent
                                C)
                             (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso
                                a0 b0 f0))) g))) b ⟧,
    let X := λ H : a = b, pr1 (idtoiso H) in X f) y) =
y
 intro; apply setproperty.
   
C: discrete_category
isweq
  (make_functor
     (make_functor_data (idfun C)
        (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
         isotoid
           (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
           (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
           (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f)))
     (make_dirprod
        ((λ a : C,
          let X :=
            λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
            (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
            pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
          X
            (setcategory_objects_set
               (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)) a)
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)) a)
            (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f)))
               (identity a))
            (identity
               (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b : C) (f : C ⟦ a0, b ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b f))
                  a)))
         :
         functor_idax
           (make_functor_data (idfun C)
              (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
               isotoid
                 (C,,
                  discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                 (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                 (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f))))
        ((λ (a b c : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
          (g : C ⟦ b, c ⟧),
          let X :=
            λ (X : hSet) (x x' : pr1 X)
            (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
            pr1 (setproperty X x x' x0 x'0) in
          X
            (setcategory_objects_set
               (C,, discrete_category_is_setcategory C))
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0))
               a)
            (make_functor_data (idfun C)
               (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                isotoid
                  (C,,
                   discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                  (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                  (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0))
               c)
            (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0)))
               (f · g))
            (# (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                  (λ (a0 b0 : C) (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                   isotoid
                     (C,,
                      discrete_category_is_setcategory
                        C)
                     (univalent_category_is_univalent
                        C)
                     (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0 f0)))
               f
             · # (make_functor_data (idfun C)
                    (λ (a0 b0 : C)
                     (f0 : C ⟦ a0, b0 ⟧),
                     isotoid
                       (C,,
                        discrete_category_is_setcategory
                          C)
                       (univalent_category_is_univalent
                          C)
                       (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a0 b0
                          f0))) g))
         :
         functor_compax
           (make_functor_data (idfun C)
              (λ (a b : C) (f : C ⟦ a, b ⟧),
               isotoid
                 (C,,
                  discrete_category_is_setcategory C)
                 (univalent_category_is_univalent C)
                 (pregroupoid_hom_weq_iso a b f))))))
 apply idisweq.
Defined.

(** ** The discrete univalent_category on n objects ([cat_n]) *)

Require Import UniMath.Combinatorics.StandardFiniteSets.


n: nat
univalent_groupoid

  
n: nat
UU
n: nat
isaset ?X

  
n: nat
UU
 exact (stn n).
  
n: nat
isaset (⟦ n ⟧)%stn
 apply isasetstn.
Defined.


n: nat
is_discrete (cat_n n)


n: nat
is_discrete (cat_n n)

  apply path_groupoid_hset_is_discrete.
Defined.

(** ** The category with one object ([unit_category]) *)


univalent_category


univalent_category

  
UU
isofhlevel 3 ?X

  
UU
 exact unit.
  
isofhlevel 3 unit
 
isofhlevel 1 unit
 apply isapropunit.
Defined.

Section FunctorToUnit.
  Context (A : precategory).

  
A: precategory
functor_data A unit_category

  
A: precategory
functor_data A unit_category

    
A: precategory
A → unit_category
A: precategory
∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → unit_category ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
A: precategory
A → unit_category
 exact tounit.
    
A: precategory
∏ a b : A,
A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → unit_category ⟦ tounit a, tounit b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _, idpath _ ).
  Defined.

  
A: precategory
is_functor functor_to_unit_data

  
A: precategory
is_functor functor_to_unit_data

    
A: precategory
functor_idax functor_to_unit_data
A: precategory
functor_compax functor_to_unit_data

    
A: precategory
functor_idax functor_to_unit_data
 
A: precategory
a: A
# functor_to_unit_data (identity a) =
identity (functor_to_unit_data a)
 apply idpath.
    
A: precategory
functor_compax functor_to_unit_data
 intros ? ? ? ? ?; apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition functor_to_unit : functor A _ := make_functor _ is_functor_to_unit.

  
A: precategory
iscontr (A ⟶ unit_category)

  
A: precategory
iscontr (A ⟶ unit_category)

    
A: precategory
A ⟶ unit_category
A: precategory
∏ t : A ⟶ unit_category, t = ?x

    
A: precategory
A ⟶ unit_category
 exact functor_to_unit.
    
A: precategory
∏ t : A ⟶ unit_category, t = functor_to_unit
 
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
F = functor_to_unit

      
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
has_homsets unit_category
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
pr1 F = pr1 functor_to_unit

      
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
has_homsets unit_category
 apply (homset_property unit_category).
      
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
pr1 F = pr1 functor_to_unit
 
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
pr1 (pr1 F) = pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit)
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
transportf
  (λ x : A → unit_category,
   ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → unit_category ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  ?p (pr2 (pr1 F)) = pr2 (pr1 functor_to_unit)

        
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
pr1 (pr1 F) = pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit)
 
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
pr1 (pr1 F) ~ pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit)
 
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x: A
pr1 (pr1 F) x = pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit) x
 
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x: A
pr1 (pr1 F) x = tounit x

          
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x: A
isaprop unit

          apply isapropunit.
        
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
transportf
  (λ x : A → unit_category,
   ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → unit_category ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextsec (λ _ : A, unit_category) (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit))
     ((λ x : A,
       proofirrelevance unit isapropunit
         (pr1 (pr1 F) x) (tounit x)
       :
       pr1 (pr1 F) x = pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit) x)
      :
      pr1 (pr1 F) ~ pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit)))
  (pr2 (pr1 F)) = pr2 (pr1 functor_to_unit)
 
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x, x0: A
x1: A ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
transportf
  (λ x : A → unit_category,
   ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → unit_category ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
  (funextsec (λ _ : A, unit_category) (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit))
     (λ x : A,
      proofirrelevance unit isapropunit
        (pr1 (pr1 F) x) (tounit x))) (pr2 (pr1 F)) x
  x0 x1 = pr2 (pr1 functor_to_unit) x x0 x1

          
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x, x0: A
x1: A ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
isaprop
  (unit_category ⟦ pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit) x,
   pr1 (pr1 functor_to_unit) x0 ⟧)

          
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x, x0: A
x1: A ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
isaprop (tounit x = tounit x0)

          
A: precategory
F: A ⟶ unit_category
x, x0: A
x1: A ⟦ x, x0 ⟧
isofhlevel 0 (tounit x = tounit x0)

          apply isapropunit.
  Qed.
End FunctorToUnit.

(**
 Functors from the unit category
 *)

C: category
x: C
functor_data unit_category C


C: category
x: C
functor_data unit_category C

  
C: category
x: C
unit_category → C
C: category
x: C
∏ a b : unit_category,
unit_category ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

  
C: category
x: C
unit_category → C
 exact (λ _, x).
  
C: category
x: C
∏ a b : unit_category,
unit_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ C ⟦ (λ _ : unit_category, x) a,
  (λ _ : unit_category, x) b ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _, identity _).
Defined.


C: category
x: C
is_functor (functor_from_unit_data x)


C: category
x: C
is_functor (functor_from_unit_data x)

  
C: category
x: C
functor_idax (functor_from_unit_data x)
C: category
x: C
functor_compax (functor_from_unit_data x)

  
C: category
x: C
functor_idax (functor_from_unit_data x)
 intro ; apply idpath.
  
C: category
x: C
functor_compax (functor_from_unit_data x)
 
C: category
x: C
a, b, c: unit_category
f: unit_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: unit_category ⟦ b, c ⟧
identity x = identity x · identity x

    
C: category
x: C
a, b, c: unit_category
f: unit_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: unit_category ⟦ b, c ⟧
identity x = identity x

    apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
x: C
unit_category ⟶ C


C: category
x: C
unit_category ⟶ C

  
C: category
x: C
functor_data unit_category C
C: category
x: C
is_functor ?F

  
C: category
x: C
functor_data unit_category C
 exact (functor_from_unit_data x).
  
C: category
x: C
is_functor (functor_from_unit_data x)
 exact (functor_from_unit_is_functor x).
Defined.


C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit x)
  (functor_from_unit y) (λ _ : unit_category, f)


C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit x)
  (functor_from_unit y) (λ _ : unit_category, f)

  
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0, x': unit_category
f0: unit_category ⟦ x0, x' ⟧
identity x · f = f · identity y

  
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
x0, x': unit_category
f0: unit_category ⟦ x0, x' ⟧
f = f

  apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y


C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y

  
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
nat_trans_data (functor_from_unit x)
  (functor_from_unit y)
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit x)
  (functor_from_unit y) ?t

  
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
nat_trans_data (functor_from_unit x)
  (functor_from_unit y)
 exact (λ _, f).
  
C: category
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_nat_trans (functor_from_unit x)
  (functor_from_unit y) (λ _ : unit_category, f)
 exact (nat_trans_from_unit_is_nat_trans f).
Defined.


C: category
F, G: C ⟶ unit_category
F ⟹ G


C: category
F, G: C ⟶ unit_category
F ⟹ G

  
C: category
F, G: C ⟶ unit_category
nat_trans_data F G
C: category
F, G: C ⟶ unit_category
is_nat_trans F G ?t

  
C: category
F, G: C ⟶ unit_category
nat_trans_data F G
 exact (λ _, pr1 (isapropunit _ _)).
  
C: category
F, G: C ⟶ unit_category
is_nat_trans F G
  (λ x : C, pr1 (isapropunit (F x) (G x)))
 abstract
      (intro ; intros ;
       apply isasetunit).
Defined.


X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
α = β


X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
α = β

  
X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
has_homsets unit_category
X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
∏ x : X, α x = β x

  
X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
has_homsets unit_category
 apply homset_property.
  
X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
∏ x : X, α x = β x
 
X: category
F, G: X ⟶ unit_category
α, β: F ⟹ G
z: X
α z = β z
 apply isasetunit.
Qed.

(** Morphisms are the same as certain natural transformations *)

C: category
x, y: C
C ⟦ x, y ⟧ ≃ functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y


C: category
x, y: C
C ⟦ x, y ⟧ ≃ functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y

  
C: category
x, y: C
C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y
C: category
x, y: C
isweq ?f

  
C: category
x, y: C
C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y
 exact nat_trans_from_unit.
  
C: category
x, y: C
isweq nat_trans_from_unit
 
C: category
x, y: C
functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y → C ⟦ x, y ⟧
C: category
x, y: C
∏ x0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, ?g (nat_trans_from_unit x0) = x0
C: category
x, y: C
∏ y0 : functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y,
nat_trans_from_unit (?g y0) = y0

    
C: category
x, y: C
functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y → C ⟦ x, y ⟧
 exact (λ n, n tt).
    
C: category
x, y: C
∏ x0 : C ⟦ x, y ⟧,
(λ n : functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y, n tt)
  (nat_trans_from_unit x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intro f ;
         apply idpath).
    
C: category
x, y: C
∏ y0 : functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y,
nat_trans_from_unit
  ((λ n : functor_from_unit x ⟹ functor_from_unit y,
    n tt) y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intros n ;
         use nat_trans_eq ; [ apply homset_property | ] ;
         intro z ; cbn ;
         induction z ;
         apply idpath).
Defined.

(** ** The category with no objects ([empty_category]) *)


univalent_category


univalent_category

  
UU
isofhlevel 3 ?X

  
UU
 exact empty.
  
isofhlevel 3 ∅
 
isofhlevel 1 ∅
 apply isapropempty.
Defined.

Section FunctorFromEmpty.
  Context (A : precategory).

  
A: precategory
functor_data empty_category A

  
A: precategory
functor_data empty_category A

    
A: precategory
empty_category → A
A: precategory
∏ a b : empty_category,
empty_category ⟦ a, b ⟧ → A ⟦ ?F a, ?F b ⟧

    
A: precategory
empty_category → A
 exact fromempty.
    
A: precategory
∏ a b : empty_category,
empty_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ A ⟦ fromempty a, fromempty b ⟧
 intros empt ?; induction empt.
  Defined.

  
A: precategory
is_functor functor_from_empty_data

  
A: precategory
is_functor functor_from_empty_data

    use tpair; intro a; induction a.
  Defined.

  Definition functor_from_empty : functor empty_category A :=
    make_functor _ is_functor_from_empty.

  (** Compare to [isaprop_is_functor]. For a functor from the empty_category,
      it's not necessary that the codomain has homsets. *)
  
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop (is_functor F)

  
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop (is_functor F)

    
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop (functor_idax F)
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop (functor_compax F)

    
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop (functor_idax F)
 
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop
  (∏ a : empty_category,
   # F (identity a) = identity (F a))

      apply impred; intro e; induction e.
    
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop (functor_compax F)
 
A: precategory
F: functor_data empty_category A
isaprop
  (∏ (a b c : empty_category)
   (f : empty_category ⟦ a, b ⟧)
   (g : empty_category ⟦ b, c ⟧),
   # F (f · g) = # F f · # F g)

      apply impred; intro e; induction e.
  Defined.

  
A: precategory
iscontr (empty_category ⟶ A)

  
A: precategory
iscontr (empty_category ⟶ A)

    
A: precategory
empty_category ⟶ A
A: precategory
∏ t : empty_category ⟶ A, t = ?x

    
A: precategory
empty_category ⟶ A
 exact functor_from_empty.
    
A: precategory
∏ t : empty_category ⟶ A, t = functor_from_empty
 
A: precategory
F: empty_category ⟶ A
F = functor_from_empty

      
A: precategory
F: empty_category ⟶ A
pr1 F = pr1 functor_from_empty
A: precategory
F: empty_category ⟶ A
transportf is_functor ?p (pr2 F) =
pr2 functor_from_empty

      
A: precategory
F: empty_category ⟶ A
pr1 F = pr1 functor_from_empty
 use total2_paths_f;
          apply funextsec; intro empt; induction empt.
      
A: precategory
F: empty_category ⟶ A
transportf is_functor
  (total2_paths_f
     (funextsec (λ _ : empty_category, A)
        (pr1 (pr1 F)) (pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty))
        ((λ empt : empty_category,
          empty_rect
            (λ empt0 : ∅,
             pr1 (pr1 F) empt0 =
             pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty) empt0) empt)
         :
         pr1 (pr1 F) ~ pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty)))
     (funextsec
        (λ t : empty_category,
         ∏ b : empty_category,
         empty_category ⟦ t, b ⟧
         → A ⟦ pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty) t,
           pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty) b ⟧)
        (transportf
           (λ x : empty_category → A,
            ∏ a b : empty_category,
            empty_category ⟦ a, b ⟧ → A ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
           (funextsec (λ _ : empty_category, A)
              (pr1 (pr1 F))
              (pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty))
              ((λ empt : empty_category,
                empty_rect
                  (λ empt0 : ∅,
                   pr1 (pr1 F) empt0 =
                   pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty) empt0)
                  empt)
               :
               pr1 (pr1 F) ~
               pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty)))
           (pr2 (pr1 F)))
        (pr2 (pr1 functor_from_empty))
        ((λ empt : empty_category,
          empty_rect
            (λ empt0 : ∅,
             transportf
               (λ x : empty_category → A,
                ∏ a b : empty_category,
                empty_category ⟦ a, b ⟧
                → A ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
               (funextsec (λ _ : empty_category, A)
                  (pr1 (pr1 F))
                  (pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty))
                  (λ empt1 : empty_category,
                   empty_rect
                     (λ empt2 : ∅,
                      pr1 (pr1 F) empt2 =
                      pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty)
                        empt2) empt1)) (pr2 (pr1 F))
               empt0 =
             pr2 (pr1 functor_from_empty) empt0) empt)
         :
         transportf
           (λ x : empty_category → A,
            ∏ a b : empty_category,
            empty_category ⟦ a, b ⟧ → A ⟦ x a, x b ⟧)
           (funextsec (λ _ : empty_category, A)
              (pr1 (pr1 F))
              (pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty))
              ((λ empt : empty_category,
                empty_rect
                  (λ empt0 : ∅,
                   pr1 (pr1 F) empt0 =
                   pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty) empt0)
                  empt)
               :
               pr1 (pr1 F) ~
               pr1 (pr1 functor_from_empty)))
           (pr2 (pr1 F)) ~
         pr2 (pr1 functor_from_empty)))) (pr2 F) =
pr2 functor_from_empty
 apply proofirrelevance, isaprop_is_functor_from_empty.
  Defined.
End FunctorFromEmpty.

(** Natural transformations for the empty category *)

C: category
F, G: empty_category ⟶ C
F ⟹ G


C: category
F, G: empty_category ⟶ C
F ⟹ G

  
C: category
F, G: empty_category ⟶ C
nat_trans_data F G
C: category
F, G: empty_category ⟶ C
is_nat_trans F G ?t

  
C: category
F, G: empty_category ⟶ C
nat_trans_data F G
 exact (λ z, fromempty z).
  
C: category
F, G: empty_category ⟶ C
is_nat_trans F G (λ z : empty_category, fromempty z)
 exact (λ z, fromempty z).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H ⟹ F ∙ G


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
H ⟹ F ∙ G

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
nat_trans_data H (F ∙ G)
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_trans H (F ∙ G) ?t

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
nat_trans_data H (F ∙ G)
 exact (λ x, fromempty (F x)).
  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_trans H (F ∙ G) (λ x : C₁, fromempty (F x))
 exact (λ x y f, fromempty (F x)).
Defined.


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_z_iso (nat_trans_to_empty F G H)


C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
is_nat_z_iso (nat_trans_to_empty F G H)

  
C₁, C₂: category
F: C₁ ⟶ empty_category
G: empty_category ⟶ C₂
H: C₁ ⟶ C₂
x: C₁
is_z_isomorphism (nat_trans_to_empty F G H x)

  exact (fromempty (F x)).
Defined.

(g : directed_interval_precategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧)

f · (g · h) = f · g · h

identity a · f = f

h: ∅

   ⟧)
 apply isapropunit.
Qed.

f: z_iso x y
x = y

    
f: z_iso true true
true = true

true = false

false = true

true = true
 apply idpath.
    
f: z_iso true false
true = false
 apply (fromempty (inv_from_z_iso f)).
    
f: z_iso false true
false = true
 apply (fromempty (pr1 f)).
    
f: z_iso false false
false = false
 apply idpath.

isaprop (x = y)
 apply isasetbool.

x, y: directed_interval_category
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU)
     (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) unit unit y)
     (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) ∅ unit y) x)
x, y: directed_interval_category
h: bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) unit unit y)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) ∅ unit y) x,, ?pr2
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (∑ g : directed_interval_category ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   is_inverse_in_precat h g)

    
x, y: directed_interval_category
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU)
     (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) unit unit y)
     (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) ∅ unit y) x)
 apply directed_interval_category_has_homprops.
    
x, y: directed_interval_category
h: bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) unit unit y)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) ∅ unit y) x,,
directed_interval_category_has_homprops x y
(λ X : UU, isaprop X)
  (∑ g : directed_interval_category ⟦ y, x ⟧,
   is_inverse_in_precat h g)
 
x, y: directed_interval_category
h: bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) unit unit y)
  (bool_rect (λ _ : bool, UU) ∅ unit y) x,,
directed_interval_category_has_homprops x y
x0: ∑ g : directed_interval_category ⟦ y, x ⟧,
is_inverse_in_precat h g
∏
x' : ∑ g : directed_interval_category ⟦ y, x ⟧,
     is_inverse_in_precat h g, isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x')

      apply isaprop_is_z_isomorphism.
Qed.
